title: UTILITY ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: THE GLORIA CENTER UTILITY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides energy payment assistance programs, emergency assistance for electric bills, heating fuel payment assistance, low-income water assistance programs, water, and garbage discount programs. 2505 W 7th Street The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: -Energy assistance: Low-income households -Emergency assistance: Low-income households with past due or shut-off notices -Water or power discounts: Residents served by the City of Hood River Water who have an active Pacific Power account in the applicant's name. Apartments or rentals that have water paid by another party are eligible for the discount as long as they are within the service area of City of Hood River. The City applies a discount to the client’s Pacific Power bill in lieu of a water bill discount in that case. -Age 60 and older and adults with disabilities: Monthly power, water, sewer, and garbage bill discounts for customers of City of The Dalles, Northern Wasco County PUD, and The Dalles or Hood River Disposal -Outreach: Must live within the service area and demonstrate crisis or a special need. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 298-5131 200 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 298-5131 Ext: 200 Main phone Main phone (541) 298-5131 ext 200 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information, or to complete online application. Call or email for an outreach utility assistance appointment. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: -Application -Proof of income -Photo ID and social security cards for all adult members -Social security cards for minors -Proof of SNAP enrollment for zero-income households -Utility bill in the applicants name LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Hood River, Sherman, and Wasco Counties and zip code 97761 Outreach appointments available to residents in Sherman and South Wasco Counties, and Cities of Cascade Locks and Parkdale SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Services: Discounted Trash/Recycling Service * Disabilities Issues Discounted Trash/Recycling Service * Older Adults Discounted Water Service Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Service Payment Assistance Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Weatherization Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY FACILITIES/CENTERS - MONTHLY DROP IN CENTER COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY HOUSING/SHELTER - EVICTION PREVENTION HOUSING/SHELTER - RAPID REHOUSING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUPPORTIVE SERVICES FOR VETERAN FAMILIES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. THE GLORIA CENTER
